commit.message:
docs: make PRD shovel-ready for Jr Developer implementation

Add INTELLIGENCE.md and fill critical gaps across all PRD docs.

New file:
- docs/PRD/INTELLIGENCE.md — Complete intelligence reference:
  GitHub Models + Ollama provider specs, all 6 model specs with full
  capabilities/domains/benchmarks, agent-to-model assignment table,
  capability tag vocabulary (closed set, kebab-case, exact match),
  bootstrap function shapes and record construction examples

ARCHITECTURE.md additions:
- Module dependency graph: 7-layer import hierarchy showing exact
  build order and what each src/ file imports
- Firehose event ordering: seq semantics, error handling, backpressure
- Mayor = Orchestrator terminology clarification
- supervisor/labeler agentTypes reserved-for-future note

IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md additions:
- Phase 0: Node.js 20 LTS requirement, pinned dependency versions
- Bootstrap Sequence: exact 10-step initialization order (Firehose first,
  Mayor subscription second, then intelligence, then agents)
- maxConcurrentTasks: documented as advisory/soft limit (no enforcement)
- Simulated Time Model: table explaining real delay vs. executionTime
  field values; per-task pre-defined executionTime for all 8 demo tasks
- Constants section: all magic numbers in one src/constants.ts reference
  (execution times, reputation weights, trust thresholds, trend detection,
  ranking weights, firehose seq start)
- Reconcile base times: canonical values are low=2s/medium=5s/high=10s

SCHEMAS.md additions:
- Capability tag normalization rules (kebab-case, exact match, INTELLIGENCE.md ref)
- Intelligence Model cross-reference to INTELLIGENCE.md for concrete values

E2E-SCENARIO.md additions:
- Simulated time model callout note at top of document

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add Report Visual BPA with CI workflow (#15)

- Add bpa-rules/ReportBPARules.json with 7 rules (layout, data, accessibility)
- Add bpa-rules/validate_report_bpa.py to evaluate rules against report.json
- Add .github/workflows/validate-report-bpa.yml triggered on report/bpa changes
- Add alt text to all 3 visuals in Games Report to pass the new BPA checks

Rules:
  - REPORT_VISUAL_WITHIN_BOUNDS (Error)
  - REPORT_NO_OVERLAPPING_VISUALS (Warning)
  - REPORT_VISUAL_HAS_PROJECTIONS (Error)
  - REPORT_PAGE_HAS_DISPLAY_NAME (Warning)
  - REPORT_MAX_VISUALS_PER_PAGE max=6 (Info)
  - REPORT_VISUAL_HAS_ALT_TEXT (Warning)

commit.message:
refactor(go,v): restructure bindings to mirror Python subdirectory layout

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Update docker-entrypoint.sh

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: prevent false zombie restarts when audio is actually playing

Zombie detection now only triggers when audio has NEVER arrived in
the current subprocess session. Brief streaming gaps (re-anchor,
group sync, track changes) no longer cause false positives — PA
buffers keep playing during these gaps so restarting is wrong.

Reverted timeout back to 15s since it now only applies to genuinely
stuck subprocesses that never received audio data.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(ai_cache): convert src/lib/ai_cache.js to TypeScript

- Add src/lib/ai_cache.ts as TypeScript source (v2.1.0)
- Export 18 interfaces: CacheEntryMeta, CacheIndexEntry, CacheIndex,
  CacheMetrics, RuntimeMetrics, CacheStats, FullCacheStats,
  DisabledCacheStats, ErrorCacheStats, CacheConfigOptions, CacheConfig,
  ValidationResult, InvalidateCacheOptions, MergedCacheMetrics,
  SetMetadata, HashStoreEntry, HashStore, CacheTimestampEntry
- withCache<T> and withFileChangeGuard<T> use generic type parameters
- getStats() returns typed union (FullCacheStats | DisabledCacheStats | ErrorCacheStats)
- Use named imports for node built-ins (no esModuleInterop needed)
- Compile to ai_cache.js + ai_cache.d.ts + ai_cache.d.ts.map via tsc

Add src/core/logger.d.ts: success() method
Update src/types/local-modules.d.ts: add ValidationError, full error
  hierarchy, success() to Logger interface, fix class names
Add src/lib/ai_cache.ts to tsconfig.json include array
Update docs/api/lib/ai_cache.md: TypeScript interfaces, updated
  signatures, new methods (withCache, withFileChangeGuard, getStats)

All 6493 tests pass (159 suites)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Update docker-entrypoint.sh

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: mute PA sinks directly on shutdown instead of pausing players

Replace subprocess pause command with direct PA sink muting in
_graceful_shutdown(). This ensures audio cuts cleanly regardless of
how the restart is triggered (systemd, Docker, HA auto-update, CLI)
instead of relying on the UI to pre-mute before restart.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: add 10 platform features — audit log, notifications, webhooks, approvals, export, branding, i18n, API playground, templates, real-time presence

Features implemented:

1. Audit Log (审计日志) — Event tracking with actor, action, resource, timestamps
2. Notification System (通知与@提及) — Bell icon, @mention detection, read/unread, preferences
3. Webhook & Integrations — CRUD webhooks, HMAC signing, delivery tracking, test endpoint
4. Approval Workflow (审批工作流) — Request/approve/reject flow, multi-reviewer, auto-resolution
5. Export Ecosystem (导出生态) — Markdown and HTML export with standalone theming
6. Custom Domain & Branding — Logo, colors, custom CSS, SEO metadata, favicon settings
7. Multi-language Docs (多语言文档管理) — Locale field, translation linking, locale switcher
8. Enhanced API Playground — Environments, auth configs, request history, CORS proxy
9. Template Library (模板市场) — 6 built-in templates, create-from-template, category browsing
10. Real-time Presence (实时协同) — Active editor tracking, presence avatars with heartbeat

Infrastructure:
- 14 new database tables with full Drizzle ORM schema and relations
- 8 new enums for status types
- 9 new query modules with business logic
- 27 new API route files
- 7 new UI components + 1 custom hook
- 5 new pages (audit logs, webhooks, approvals, branding, templates)
- Navigation integration in top nav with notification bell
- Editor integration with export menu, locale switcher, and presence avatars
- Template picker in document list page

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Oak code review of PR #25 (GardenScene keyboard listener leak)

commit.message:
fix: resolve all issues found in workflow log analysis

- fix(step_0b): remove no-useless-assignment ESLint error in readmeSize try/catch
- fix(tests): correct version_analysis test 'calculates minor gap' to use stable version string
- fix(timers): add .unref() to sleep/retry timers to prevent Jest worker leaks
  - src/lib/step1_parallel.js: clearTimeout in _executeWithTimeout .finally()
  - src/orchestrator/step_executor.js: .unref() on _sleep timer
  - src/lib/auto_commit.js: .unref() on scheduleCommit timer
  - src/utils/retry.js: .unref() on default sleep timer
  - src/lib/ai_helpers.js: .unref() on retry delay timer
- fix(jest): add forceExit to prevent npm test crash during step_08 workflow
- fix(session_manager): widen timing margins in flaky age test
- fix(step_16): treat EISDIR as skip (not failure) when updating versions in files
  — prevents .workflow_core submodule from appearing as a failure
- fix(step_09): accept git+ssh:// and git+https:// resolved URLs as valid
  — private packages using SSH git URLs no longer flagged as lockfile issues
- fix(docs): update stale v1.0.0 version metadata to v1.7.2 across all docs
  — 37 doc files updated: errors.md, ERROR_CODES.md, and all api/guides/reference docs
- test: add EISDIR test for step_16 updateVersionsInFiles
- test: add git+ssh and git+https lockfile validation tests for step_09

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Implement whitelist and jurisdiction compliance policy engine for regulated issuance (#505)

* Initial plan

* Add issuance compliance policy engine

- Models: IssuancePolicyModels.cs with IssuancePolicyOutcome enum, IssuanceCompliancePolicy,
  CreateIssuancePolicyRequest, UpdateIssuancePolicyRequest, EvaluateParticipantRequest,
  MatchedPolicyRule, IssuancePolicyDecisionResult, IssuancePolicyResponse, IssuancePolicyListResponse
- Service interface: IIssuancePolicyService with CRUD and evaluate methods
- Service: IssuancePolicyService with in-memory ConcurrentDictionary storage, tenant isolation,
  whitelist pagination loop, jurisdiction allow/block lists, KYC checks

Replace 3-provider setup (Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama) with a 2-provider
architecture for prototyping:
- GitHub Models: unified cloud gateway for Claude, GPT, Phi, and other
  commercial models available via GitHub's public catalog
- Local Ollama: self-hosted inference for open-source models (Llama 3 70B, CodeLlama)

Changes across all PRD docs:
- ARCHITECTURE.md: updated IntelligenceProvider/Model types (added endpoint,
  modelOrigin fields); added MVP Provider Strategy section; updated bootstrap flow
- E2E-SCENARIO.md: updated provider tree, model counts, all intelligence
  attribution strings, character sheets, and dashboard widget labels
- SCHEMAS.md: updated provider example to GitHub Models; added modelOrigin
  to IntelligenceModel interface and JSON example; updated providerDid DIDs
- IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md: updated bootstrap mock data strategy (2 providers, 6 models)
- README.md: updated Intelligence as Core Primitive section with 2-provider rationale

modelOrigin field preserves original creator attribution (e.g., Anthropic, OpenAI)
as informational metadata separate from the serving provider (GitHub Models).

commit.message:
fix: startup unmute watcher killing daemon after 60s timeout

Two bugs in _startup_unmute_watcher introduced in smooth restart:
1. unmute_task was in asyncio.wait(FIRST_COMPLETED) — its completion
   after 60s timeout killed the daemon. Now fire-and-forget.
2. Unconditional unmute on timeout even when no audio streamed —
   now skips unmute if audio_streaming was never True.

commit.message:
fix: redesign comment flow for seamless select-comment-submit UX

Before: clicking Comment in bubble menu showed a toast telling users
to manually open the sidebar — a dead-end UX.

After: Select text → click Comment → sidebar auto-opens with a
pre-filled form showing the quoted text → type comment → submit →
CommentMark highlight is applied to the text range in the editor.

Changes:
- Add CommentSelection type + onComment callback to DocEditorProps
- Add applyCommentMark method to DocEditorHandle
- Editor captures selection (from/to/text) on comment action
- Editor page auto-opens sidebar + passes pendingComment context
- Sidebar shows NewCommentForm at top when pending comment exists
- After submit, CommentMark is applied to the text range
- Keyboard shortcuts: ⌘+Enter to submit, Escape to cancel
- Reply form also supports ⌘+Enter and Escape
- Resolve badge uses tone tokens instead of hardcoded emerald

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add CopilotHive.Worker — C# client service for worker containers

Implements the worker-side service that runs inside Docker containers:

- Program.cs: Entry point parsing env vars (ORCHESTRATOR_URL, WORKER_ROLE,
  WORKER_ID, WORKER_CAPABILITIES, COPILOT_PORT) with graceful SIGTERM handling
- WorkerService.cs: Core lifecycle — gRPC registration, heartbeat (30s),
  bidirectional WorkStream, task dispatch, AGENTS.md updates
- GitOperations.cs: Git CLI operations (clone, checkout, branch, push, status)
  with ForceDeleteDirectoryAsync for Windows file-lock safety
- CopilotRunner.cs: JSON-RPC HTTP client for headless Copilot CLI communication
- TaskExecutor.cs: Full task lifecycle — clone repos, handle branches, send
  prompt to Copilot, collect git status, report completion

References CopilotHive.Shared for gRPC proto types. All 122 existing tests pass.

commit.message:
Update git submodules

* Update manila from branch 'master'
  to e6a04c9b64f976520791dddb628f5e968b83c8a8
  - Merge "Fix generic driver NFS share deletion 'target is busy' error"
  - Fix generic driver NFS share deletion 'target is busy' error
    
    When deleting NFS shares from generic driver service VMs, the
    operation can fail with 'target is busy' because NFS exports are
    not unexported before unmount is attempted.
    
    This patch fixes the issue by:
    
    1. Implementing NFSHelper.remove_exports() to actively unexport all
       NFS clients via 'exportfs -u' before the share is unmounted.
       Previously this method was a no-op.
    
    2. Adding a lazy unmount fallback in GenericShareDriver._unmount_device()
       that detects 'is busy' errors and retries with 'umount -l' to allow
       the unmount to succeed even when NFS kernel state hasn't fully
       drained.
    
    Assisted-By: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
    Change-Id: I9e31a0e082c50ab24b3f01522aba7bb1fb2eaa64
    Signed-off-by: Yaguang Tang <heut2008@gmail.com>
